global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with game-related text and icons.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to join the game with a promotional offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Game Title
elements.description: The text 'IronQuest' is prominently displayed in bold, large font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Arena Invitation
elements.description: The text 'Join the arena' is presented in a medium-sized font, inviting users to participate.

elements.label: Ad-Free Offer
elements.description: The text 'No ads in first week' is shown in a smaller font beneath the invitation, emphasizing a promotional offer.

elements.label: Game Icons
elements.description: Four circular icons are arranged in a grid pattern, suggesting gameplay elements or features.

elements.label: Left Decorative Element
elements.description: A small decorative element located on the left side, possibly an icon or graphic.

elements.label: Right Decorative Element
elements.description: A small decorative element on the right side, possibly an icon or graphic.

elements.label: Top Center Element
elements.description: A small element positioned at the top center, possibly an icon or graphic.

elements.label: Center Bottom Element
elements.description: A small element located at the center bottom, possibly an icon or graphic.

elements.label: Left Top Element
elements.description: A small element positioned at the left top, possibly an icon or graphic.

elements.label: Left Center Element
elements.description: A small element located at the left center, possibly an icon or graphic.

elements.label: Install Button
elements.description: The button 'Install now' is prominently displayed at the bottom in a bold, inviting font.

elements.label: Promotional Message
elements.description: The text 'Join the arena No ads in first week' is displayed in a clear, readable font.
elements.text_content: Join the arena No ads in first week

elements.label: Call to Action
elements.description: The 'Install now' button is designed to attract attention with a contrasting color.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, body text is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
